subcodes.first_line: O dear handmaid of God! Thy letter hath arrived. Notwithstanding the lack of time, I am writing a brief response out of the utmost love
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز الهی نامه تو رسید با عدم فرصت از نهایت محبت جواب مختصری مینگارم
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
